opinion.h1: SUNSHINE BOOK CO. v. SUMMERFIELD, 355 U.S. 372 (1958)
opinion.h4: SUNSHINE BOOK CO. ET AL. v. SUMMERFIELD, POSTMASTER GENERAL. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE UNITED STATES COURT OF APPEALS FOR THE DISTRICT OF COLUMBIA CIRCUIT. No. 587. Decided January 13, 1958.
opinion.p: Solicitor General Rankin, Assistant Attorney General Doub and Samuel D. Slade for respondent.
The petition for writ of certiorari is granted and the judgment of the United States Court of Appeals for the District of Columbia Circuit is reversed. Roth v. United States, 354 U.S. 476.
